title: RE:RE:RE:RE: Subject Appening "RE:" After Every Reply
excerpt:

posts.author: murphyslcp (Seth Murphy)
posts.cookedHtml:
(Regarding Monday Service Work OS Product)
Please update how email subjects are being generated. Replies and reply-alls automatically prepend “RE,” which quickly becomes excessive and confusing. The current behavior makes long threads look messy and unprofessional. New emails allow us to create appropriate subject lines, which is a great feature and should be available for all emails/responses sent, regardless of the selection.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Have you put it on the feature suggestion board? Feature requests - monday Community Forum

posts.author: murphyslcp (Seth Murphy)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for the suggestion, Desiree! Just submitted the post, under review currently.

posts.author: murphyslcp (Seth Murphy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please upvote this:

RE:RE:RE:RE: Subject Appening “RE:” After Every Reply Feature requests
Description Replies and reply-alls automatically prepend “RE,” which quickly becomes excessive and confusing. The current behavior makes long threads look messy and unprofessional. What are you trying to achieve Please update how email subjects are being generated. New emails allow us to create appropriate subject lines, which is a great feature and should be available for all emails/responses sent, regardless of the selection.

If you want to see this improvement!

Thank you
